# Recurring Prompt Templates

Use these in ChatGPT Tasks or your recurring workflow.

## 1) Weekly Notes Ideation

Prompt:

Generate 10 high-leverage Notes ideas for Noah Lucas based on VP Product + entrepreneur positioning.
For each idea include:
- Strong title
- One-sentence thesis
- Why this matters now
- Outline with 5 bullets
- Best format (essay/teardown/field note/playbook)
Prioritize contrarian but defensible perspectives and practical operator insight.

## 2) Weekly Ghostwriting Draft

Prompt:

Draft a publish-ready Note for noahlucas.com from this brief:
[PASTE BRIEF]
Constraints:
- Voice: sharp, operator-first, zero fluff
- 800-1200 words
- Include one concrete framework and one real-world example
- End with a concise CTA for discussion on LinkedIn
Also provide:
- Meta title (<=60 chars)
- Meta description (<=155 chars)
- 3 social pull-quotes

## 3) Weekly Analytics Interpretation

Prompt:

Act as a growth analyst for a personal brand website.
Given these metrics:
[PASTE METRICS]
Return:
- What changed (traffic, top pages, referrers)
- What likely caused it
- 3 prioritized experiments for next week
- 1 content bet for Notes
- 1 homepage or UX experiment
Keep recommendations specific and measurable.

## 4) Monthly Brand Narrative Audit

Prompt:

Review my current website narrative as VP Product + entrepreneur.
Based on these pages and recent Notes:
[PASTE CONTENT]
Return:
- Narrative strengths
- Narrative gaps
- Positioning risks
- Updated positioning statement (3 variants)
- Specific page-level changes to fix gaps
